title: Digital Technology for Rehearsal Room
openingLine: Hi, I was at Midwest Clinic and I saw the new rehearsal room technology you're showing. I want to know more — can someone come out and figure out if it'll work in my room? I'm not super technical so I want to understand what I'd actually be getting.
customerContext: You're intrigued but cautious. You've been burned by tech that overpromises before — the old SmartBoard you bought a decade ago is collecting dust. You want someone to walk you through this honestly, not give you a sales pitch. Your principal is supportive but also cynical about education technology.

hiddenInfo.reveal: No specific budget yet. Principal said he'd look at it if it's compelling.
If funding came through quickly, this school year. Otherwise next.
Principal first, then district tech department has to bless it because of integration concerns.
Standard rectangular band room, 50x40 ft. Has projector and basic AV but nothing music-specific.
We have iPads for some students but no centralized recording or playback. SmartMusic for some students.
I worry about training. Whatever we get has to be usable on day one or it'll sit in a corner.
My choir colleague would want to use it too. Could be shared across rooms.

Discovery & Qualification.behavior: Requested layout from facilities or offered field measurement
Researched purchase history before the visit
Asked about needs, budget, and timeline up front
Asked for customer expectations and concerns
Asked if they're working with a consultant or architect

Solution Framing.behavior: Offered help if the project is over budget
Discussed National Contracts vs. competitive bidding
Explained training and onboarding plan, not just product

Opportunity Expansion.behavior: Probed for additional rooms or programs that could share the technology

BANT.behavior: Asked whether the project has a budget or funding source
Identified principal and district tech as approvers
Confirmed when they want the solution in place

Timeline Awareness.behavior: Set follow-up tasks based on findings
